Package Cataphract.API.Minotaur

package Cataphract.API.Minotaur
The Minotaur package contains tools relating to cryptography for checking hashes for files and literals. 
 Currently, the following algorithms are deemed necessary to hash files and literals:
 + MD5
 + SHA-256
 + SHA3-256

 More algorithm implementations may be added in the future as necessary.
Since:
v0.0.1 (10-April-2020, Zen Quantum)
Version:
v1.0.0 (11-October-2023, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)
